node.name: Full-Day Workshop
node.description: Intensive all-day work workshop with the entire team. Exhausting but productive session covering project roadmap and deliverables.

matched_nodes.tree_path: Root > Itinerary_Version 1 > Day 5 > Email Catch-up Block

node.name: Email Catch-up Block
node.description: Dedicated time_block to respond to accumulated work emails. Optional but recommended to stay on top of inbox.

node.name: YYZ Departure
node.description: Flight departure from Toronto Pearson International Airport. End of trip.

node.name: Harbourfront Stroll
node.description: Easy, relaxing walk along the waterfront. Low-energy activity perfect for recovering from travel_method. Beautiful lake views and fresh air.

matched_nodes.tree_path: Root > Itinerary_Version 1 > Day 2 > Client Kickoff Meeting

node.name: Client Kickoff Meeting
node.description: Formal business meeting at TD Tower with key stakeholders. High-pressure work presentation and strategy discussion. Professional corporate environment.
